_comment: Server-side permission policy for tunnel-mcp. Claude Code settings.json compatible. Precedence: deny > ask > allow. Rules are Tool or Tool(specifier). Bash specifiers match the command line ('git *' glob, or 'git commit:*' prefix form); path-tool specifiers (Read/Write/Edit/Glob/Grep) are doublestar globs over the resolved absolute path, relative to the workspace when not absolute.
